title: Click on the 'OK' button
test_steps: Click on the 'OK' button at the bottom of the screen.

title: Enter a valid VIN
test_steps: Enter a valid VIN into the input field. | Click on the 'OK' button.
expected_result: The input field is filled with a valid VIN. | The 'OK' button is clicked.

title: Enter an invalid VIN
test_steps: Enter an invalid VIN into the input field. | Click on the 'OK' button.
expected_result: The input field is filled with an invalid VIN. | The 'OK' button is clicked.

title: Click on the menu icon
test_steps: Click on the menu icon on the left side of the header.

title: Check accessibility of the screen
test_steps: Perform a screen reader test on the 'Add vehicle' screen.
expected_result: The screen is accessible to users with screen readers.

title: Check usability of the screen
test_steps: Perform a usability test on the 'Add vehicle' screen.
expected_result: The screen is easy to use and navigate.

title: Test data persistence
test_steps: Enter a valid VIN into the input field. | Click on the 'OK' button. | Navigate away from the screen. | Navigate back to the 'Add vehicle' screen.
expected_result: The input field still contains the valid VIN.
